speaker: speaker1
text: Excuse me , waiter , I would like to have some wine before the main course .

speaker: speaker2
text: Have you decided what wine you would like ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I have no idea . Maybe you can give me some advice .

speaker: speaker2
text: I recommend you the white wine . It will wake up your appetite .

speaker: speaker1
text: That's great , bring me a bottle of that please .
